title: fagraea kinghamii
intro: Fagraea kinghamii, also known as the bunga telang or royal purple frangipani, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. Traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine, Fagraea kinghamii has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit antimicrobial effects. Fagraea kinghamii can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as tea, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of certain health conditions.
